components.name: SampleCode
components.description: Directory-level first-party BSP test-sample component included from test-sample scope path SampleCode/

components.name: FatFs
components.author: ChaN
components.description: FatFs - Generic FAT file system module for embedded systems (ANSI C/C89), integrated as vendored source code.

license.name: FatFs license (BSD-like, as declared by ChaN in source header)

properties.name: bsp:component-source
properties.value: FatFs (ChaN) - Generic FAT file system module

components.name: HIDTransferTest
components.author: Nuvoton Technology Corporation
components.description: HID Transfer Test Tool - Windows host-side command-line utility for exercising the NuMicro USB HID Transfer device sample. Fixed VID 0x0416, configurable PID (default 0x5020).

properties.name: bsp:copyright
properties.value: Copyright (C) 2010-2026 Nuvoton Technology Corp. All rights reserved.

components.name: libjpeg
components.author: Independent JPEG Group
components.description: Independent JPEG Group libjpeg vendored in ThirdParty/libjpeg, including JPEG compression/decompression library sources, command-line tools, build scripts, documentation, and test images.

components.name: lwIP
components.author: lwIP project / Swedish Institute of Computer Science
components.description: lwIP TCP/IP stack vendored in ThirdParty/lwIP, including stack source, public headers, apps, network interface code, documentation, tests, and license text.

components.name: mbed TLS
components.author: Mbed TLS Contributors
components.description: mbed TLS cryptographic and TLS library vendored in ThirdParty/mbedtls, including public headers, PSA Cryptography API support, and library source files.

components.name: MCUboot imgtool
components.author: MCUboot project
components.description: Host-side MCUboot image signing and image management tool bundled under Tool/mcuboot. The BSP includes imgtool only, not the MCUboot bootloader.

properties.name: bsp:usage
properties.value: host-side image signing and image management tool

components.name: Eclipse Paho MQTT Embedded C
components.author: Ian Craggs / Eclipse Paho project
components.description: Eclipse Paho MQTT C/C++ client library for embedded platforms vendored in ThirdParty/paho.mqtt.embedded-c, including MQTTPacket, MQTTClient, MQTTClient-C, samples, tests, documentation, build metadata, and license texts.

license.name: Eclipse Public License v1.0 OR Eclipse Distribution License v1.0

properties.name: paho_mqtt_embedded_c_included_top_level_paths
properties.value: .settings; Debug; doc; MQTTClient; MQTTClient-C; MQTTPacket; test

components.name: OTAServerDemo Android App
components.author: Nuvoton Technology Corporation
components.description: Nuvoton OTAServerDemo Android application distributed as a pre-built APK for Secure OTA sample workflows.

externalReferences.comment: Public source repository for the OTAServerDemo Android application

components.name: shine
components.author: Savonet / shine project
components.description: shine fixed-point MP3 encoding library vendored in ThirdParty/shine, including encoder library sources, command-line encoder source, JavaScript build support, test assets, build metadata, and license text.

components.name: libusb-win32 kernel driver
components.description: host-side Windows USB kernel driver dependency

properties.name: bsp:usage
properties.value: host-side Windows USB kernel driver dependency
